you can use numpad on 60% keyboards with rebinds
autohotkey
there's a few things,
you can numpad cancel; hold shift -> hold numpad -> relase shift
guaranteed 1f
you can also set up jumps; hold shift -> hold numpad -> press left/right
to basically guarantee jump and left/right on the same frame
by "numpad" key i mean any numpad number button with numlock enabled
you can do a jump lower than a 1f by releasing shift while already doing a 1f
called low cancel
0.5f is a fake term lol

you can do a low cancel with numpad by pressing shift and numpad on the same frame and then release shift (for some keyboards this doesn't work and it actually only works with rebinded shift, idk why)
for me i rebind a to num0 since it is right next to the shift key so i can do it quite consistently
probably a keyboard quirk
idk
if you want help with that stuff i recommend asking in the needle tech server
if you aren't in it already i can send you an invite if you like
